intro.title: Introduction
intro.subtitle: Why this association exists
intro.body: "Bearing fruit that brings glory to God and building a generation shaped by Christ's love, modern technology plays a major role." In the 21st century, the church cannot fulfill the gospel mission without using the technology of our time. As founding members, we rise to obey the Great Commission our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ gave in Mark 16:15: "Go into all the world and preach the gospel to all creation." We recognize that social media has become the largest public square of our age. TikTok, in particular, is now the most widely used platform among millions of Ethiopian youth and families every day. Social media holds tremendous influence in Ethiopian society, and Christian family values, moral standards, and gospel truths are often pressured in the digital world. As Christian content creators, we believe we carry a heavenly stewardship to bring the light of the Word into this network. Although millions gather here, much of the content undermines Christian values, weakens families, and drives the generation toward moral decline. Therefore, it has become a responsibility of our time to gather believing families active on TikTok under one spiritual covering and guide them in an orderly way under the council's recognition and leadership. This association was founded on Hamle 1, 2017 E.C. to empower content creators, build families, and deliver the gospel through technology.

about.title: Our Mission and Vision
about.subtitle: Rooted in the gospel, reaching a digital generation
about.missionText: Equip and unite Christian families and content creators to share the gospel through modern media while upholding biblical values.
about.visionText: A generation shaped by Christ's love, bearing fruit that honors God in every digital space.

covenant.title: Association Covenant
rules: I will honor Christ in every piece of content I publish.
I will avoid content that promotes immorality or division.
I will seek counsel from the association leadership when needed.
I will respect fellow members and promote unity.
I will protect the reputation of the gospel and the church.
I will use my platforms to strengthen families.
I will be accountable for the content I share.
I will serve with humility and excellence.
I will uphold the association's decisions and guidance.
I will pray for the association and its mission.
